title: Operation Durge's Lance

{{Quote|The right to secede and determine our own fates dictates our mission. These are not raids of cold conquest. Palpatine knows the terms. Let the Confederacy be, and this war will end.|[[Shadowfeed/Legends|Shadowfeed]] infopacket|<ref name="CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 15:3:21 Edition">{{InsiderCite|76|CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 15:3:21 Edition}}</ref>}}
'''Operation Durge's Lance''' was a major offensive launched by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] along the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], at the height of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], and armed with new and precise maps of local [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperroutes]] with the goal of preparing for an invasion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. 

During the offensive, the [[Confederate First Fleet|First Fleet]] and [[Confederate Third Fleet|Third Fleet]] of the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]] was launched from [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]]. The fleets were provisioned by supply lines from [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] and [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. The battles during the campaign were considered to be General Grievous's greatest successes.

==History==
{{Quote|We have taken the battle to the Republic's heart and have shown those cowards how far we are willing to go to protect what is ours.|[[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] on his victory at [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]|<ref name="CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 15:3:21 Edition" />}}
Weeks into the Offensive, at 0221 local time, the Separatist forces [[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|broke through]] the outer system defenses of Duro, making it another major world to be targeted by Operation Durge's Lance.<ref name="Shadowfeed 15:2:29" /> After the fall of [[Jyvus Space City]], one of the largest [[City-ship/Legends|space cities]] of Duro, the Separatists lowered the planetary shield and began a [[Base Delta Zero/Legends|orbital bombardment]] of the planet's industrial factories.<ref name="HNN 15:3:02">{{InsiderCite|75|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 15:3:02}}</ref> This caused the complete destruction of the already fragile ecosystem of Duro.<ref name="SoF">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref> The battle resulted in a quick and overwhelming victory for the Confederacy, which was used much in CIS [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]].

[[File:CIS_Troops.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Organic forces deployed on Moorja]]
After the Battle of Duro, the Corellian Trade Spine was declared secured by the Separatists. [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] combat engineers towed asteroid bodies into strategic positions along the Trade Spine. [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] nodes were dismantled and replaced by [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] [[Munificent-class star frigate/Legends|communication ships]]. The Separatists placed organic forces on the [[Ion storm/Legends|ion storm]] plagued world of [[Moorja/Legends|Moorja]]. These troops protected the vulnerable 'back door' to the Separatist's recent conquests along the Trade Spine. Both the [[Shadowfeed/Legends|CIS Shadowfeed]] and [[HoloNet News/Legends|Holonet News]] speculated on the next moves of the Separatists. With assaults along the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] being mention.<ref name="Shadowfeed 15:3:21">{{InsiderCite|74|CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 15:2:29 Edition}}</ref> [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] meanwhile prepared for an impending attack by the Separatists.<ref name="HNN 15:3:02" />

[[Humbarine/Legends|Humbarine]], a founding member of the Republic, fell victim to the wrath of Grievous. The [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] was subjected to an [[Standard hour|hour]]-long [[Bombardment of Humbarine/Legends|bombardment]], leaving the planet uninhabitable.<ref name="RotSICS">''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections]]''</ref> Humbarine was subsequently abandoned by the Republic.<ref name="Oicunn">{{DB|character|ltoicunn|Oicunn, Lieutenant}}</ref> Grievous believed that terrorizing civilian populations was the essence of war.<ref name="TEGW" /> From his flagship, the [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']], he [[Battle of Loedorvia|released]] the [[Brainrot Plague]] on [[Loedorvia]]. The plague spread through the entire [[Weemell sector/Legends|Weemell sector]], killing all the [[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone]] [[Army/Legends|armies]] and nearly every [[Human/Legends|Human]] in the sector.<ref name="RotSICS" /> Operation Durge's Lance reached as far as [[Kaikielius/Legends|Kaikielius]].<ref name="TTSP" /> During the [[Kaikielius campaign|battle]], an incident occurred that would be dubbed [[Mad Clone of Kaikielius]] by [[HoloNet/Legends|Holonet]] commentators.<ref name="TEGWAc">{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-9-battlfields-of-the-clone-wars|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 9: Battlefields of the Clone Wars}}</ref>

==Aftermath==
Mismanagement of the war by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] caused for calls of more centralization of command. The possibility of the dissolution of the [[Senate Action Subcommittee]]s got opposition from Senators [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] and [[Lexi Dio/Legends|Lexi Dio]].<ref name="HNN 15:3:29">{{InsiderCite|76|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 15:3:29}}</ref> At some point, the Separatist advance ground to a halt, and the Republic began the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]] in a massive counterattack.
